jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates:
Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates!
